title: Savory Sweet Venezuelan Potato Bowl
description: A sweet and crumbly Venezuelan dish featuring potatoes and mirepoix base, perfect for a weeknight dinner
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the diced potatoes with 1 tablespoon of olive oil, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper until they are evenly coated.
Spread the potatoes in a single layer on a baking sheet and roast for 20 minutes.
In a large skillet, heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium heat.
Add the diced onion, grated carrots, and diced celery to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 10 minutes.
Stir in the chopped fresh cilantro and cook for an additional 1 minute.
To assemble the bowls, divide the roasted potatoes between 4 lacquerware bowls.
Top the potatoes with the cooked mirepoix mixture and serve immediately.
